$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor support.

model.description: Optional Copilot model override for this repository.

reasoningEffort.description: Optional reasoning effort override for this repository.

title.description: Optional Code Insights report title override.

commentStrategy.description: How the tagged pull request summary comment should be updated.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of changed files to review after filtering.

maxFindings.description: Maximum number of findings to publish.

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence threshold for reportable findings.

maxPatchChars.description: Maximum diff characters to send for a reviewed file.

defaultFileSliceLines.description: Default line window when reading file content slices.

maxFileSliceLines.description: Maximum line window allowed for file content slices.

ignorePaths.description: Repo-relative glob patterns for changed files that should be skipped during review.

title: Copilot Code Review Config
description: Trusted repository-level review configuration loaded from copilot-code-review.json at the pull request base commit.
